method_summary: AIBuildAI-2 is a knowledge-enhanced agent with an external, evolving knowledge system that automatically builds AI models using a hierarchical knowledge structure that dynamically loads relevant context.
key_innovation: A hierarchical, evolving knowledge system that dynamically loads context relevant to the current state and task, and evolves from the agent's own experience by distilling completed runs into structured takeaways.
best_result: First place on MLE-Bench with 70.7% medal rate
title: AIBuildAI-2: Scalable Agentic AI Research and Engineering
